services.name: Emergency Numbers
services.description: Unified emergency support for police, fire and medical response in Uttar Pradesh.
services.coverage: Police, fire, ambulance and GRP emergency response
services.fullDescription: Use 112 for immediate emergency response. This is the first number residents should use for serious incidents where police, fire or medical dispatch is required.
services.map: Use phone map/search for nearest emergency responder

services.name: Police Station Ecotech III
services.description: Local police station reference for Ecotech III and nearby Greater Noida areas.
services.address: Ecotech III, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201306
services.coverage: Police assistance, complaints, verification and emergency response
services.fullDescription: Local police station reference for society residents. For emergencies, dial 112 first. For non-emergency follow-up, residents may visit the station or use official UP Police channels.
services.map: Search Police Station Ecotech III, Greater Noida

services.name: Fire Services
services.description: Fire emergency support for fire, smoke, electrical hazard and rescue situations.
services.address: Nearest fire station dispatch through emergency helpline
services.coverage: Fire, smoke, rescue and electrical hazard emergency
services.fullDescription: Call fire services immediately for fire, smoke, short circuit, LPG leak or rescue emergency. Keep the gate informed so response vehicles can enter quickly.
services.map: Use 112/101 dispatch or nearest fire station search

services.name: Ambulance Services
services.description: Emergency medical transport and first-response ambulance support.
services.coverage: Medical emergency, accident, patient transfer and emergency dispatch
services.fullDescription: Use 108/102/112 for medical emergency dispatch. Keep patient location, gate access, house number and nearest landmark ready.
services.map: Use emergency dispatch or nearest hospital directions

services.name: KDSG Super Speciality Hospital
services.description: Nearby hospital reference for emergency and specialist care.
services.coverage: Emergency care, consultation, diagnostics and speciality services
services.fullDescription: Hospital reference for resident awareness. Verify live emergency and appointment numbers from the hospital website before use.

services.name: Yatharth Super Speciality Hospital
services.description: Greater Noida hospital reference for emergency and multi-speciality care.
services.address: Sec - Omega - I, Near Pari Chowk, Greater Noida - 201309
services.coverage: Emergency care, ambulance support, multi-speciality hospital services
services.fullDescription: Hospital reference for Greater Noida residents. Confirm latest contact details from the official hospital website before travel.
services.map: Search Yatharth Super Speciality Hospital Greater Noida

services.name: Kailash Hospital
services.description: Greater Noida hospital reference near NPCL customer care office area.
services.coverage: Emergency, ambulance, OPD and hospital services
services.fullDescription: Hospital reference for residents. Confirm ambulance number and emergency availability from the official website before use.

services.name: Fortis Healthcare
services.description: Greater Noida Fortis hospital reference for emergency and specialist care.
services.coverage: Emergency, trauma, diagnostics, speciality care and inpatient services
services.fullDescription: Fortis Greater Noida reference for residents. Verify live contact number and route from the official hospital page.

services.name: NPCL Electricity Services
services.description: Electricity supply, outage, meter, recharge and customer care support.
services.address: NPCL Customer Care: KP-1 Tugalpur and Techzone-IV Greater Noida offices
services.coverage: Supply outage, meter issue, prepaid recharge, new connection and customer care
services.fullDescription: Use NPCL official channels for power outage, common electricity, prepaid recharge and meter-related support.
services.map: Search NPCL customer care Greater Noida

services.name: Electrician Services
services.description: Society electrician placeholder for common lights, panels and wiring issues.
services.coverage: Street lights, panels, common wiring and minor electrical support
services.fullDescription: Use this for non-emergency common electrical issues. For fire or shock risk, use emergency numbers first.

services.name: Plumbing Services
services.description: Plumbing support for pipeline, leakage and sewage-related issues.
services.coverage: Pipelines, leakage, sewage, drains and common plumbing
services.fullDescription: Use this for common pipeline, drain, sewage and leakage complaints. Add block and house reference when raising a complaint.

services.name: Water & Submersible Services
services.description: Water tank, common motor, private submersible and pressure issue support.
services.coverage: Common water system, tank cleaning, motor repair, pipeline pressure
services.fullDescription: Use this for water motor, tank, pressure or supply issues. Emergency water motor failures should be escalated to RWA maintenance immediately.

services.name: Housekeeping & Cleaning Services
services.description: Cleaning support for roads, drains, garbage pickup and common areas.
services.coverage: Garbage collection, sweeping, common area cleaning and debris removal
services.fullDescription: Use this for cleaning, garbage, construction debris and common area upkeep requests.

services.name: Builder & Developer Support
services.description: Builder pending handover, construction and dispute follow-up placeholder.
services.coverage: Builder pending plots, handover issues, construction coordination and disputes
services.fullDescription: Use this for builder pending, dispute, construction debris and handover related follow-up.

services.name: Society Security Desk
services.description: Gate, visitor, worker, delivery and emergency coordination desk.
services.coverage: Gate pass, visitors, workers, deliveries, emergency entry support
services.fullDescription: Use the security desk for visitor and worker entry support. For police/fire/medical emergency, dial 112 first.

services.name: Vehicle & Parking Support
services.description: Parking discipline, blocked road, vehicle entry and parking dispute support.
services.coverage: Vehicle entry, parking issue, blocked road and visitor parking support
services.fullDescription: Use this for blocked road, parking disputes, visitor parking and vehicle entry support.
